nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, saying, ‘On the fifteenth of this seventh month is the Feast of Booths for seven days to the Lord.

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel, saying, On the fifteenth day of this seventh month and for seven days is the Feast of Booths to the Lord.

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人：七月十五日是住棚節，要在耶和華面前守這七天的節期。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “从七月十五日开始，你们要一连七天向耶和华守住棚节。
